hero.tagline: I turn business logic into efficient, well-structured software. I build web applications with React and systems with Python and MySQL, focused on solving the real problem — not just writing code.

about.title: About me
about.body1: I'm Carlos Iván Perdomo, a Software Analysis and Development technologist in the final stage of my training. I design and build web applications and management systems with a practical mindset: understanding the business problem before writing the first line of code.
about.body2: My edge is the professional maturity and discipline I bring from years of prior work experience. I don't just write code that works: I structure maintainable solutions, optimize system logic and communicate clearly, bringing judgment and stability to any development team.
about.body3: I keep learning continuously: I read technical documentation in English, follow current technologies like React and Vite, and strengthen my foundations in Python, JavaScript and databases. Staying current isn't optional; it's part of the craft.
